title: TASS Capability Contract
description: Schema for tass.contract.yaml — the capability enforcement policy (Capability Manifest Spec v0.1)

version.description: Contract format version. Must be the integer 1.

service.description: Human-readable service name for documentation purposes.

allowed.description: Per-category allowlists. Capabilities in a listed category must match at least one pattern. Categories not listed are unrestricted.

additionalProperties.description: Glob patterns matched against capability name, ID, or raw evidence. Case-insensitive.

forbidden.description: Per-category blocklists. Capabilities matching any pattern are hard-blocked.

additionalProperties.description: Glob patterns. Use "*" to block the entire category unconditionally.

limits.description: Maximum number of novel capabilities per category per PR scan.

additionalProperties.description: Maximum count of novel capabilities in this category per scan.
